sections.title: Live and Learn Event
sections.content:
Event Duration: 24 hours

__TABLE__
Requirements | Rewards
300 minutes of Research Speedup spent | 50,000 Gold 50,000 Wood 5-minute Speedup x2
900 minutes of Research Speedup spent | Epic Medal x2 50,000 Gold 50,000 Wood 37,500 Ore
2,700 minutes of Research Speedup spent | Gold Key x1 Epic Lucky Medal x1 8-hour Gold Production Boost 8-hour Mana Production Boost
5,400 minutes of Research Speedup spent | Legendary Medal 60-minute Building Speedup x1 60-minute Training Speedup x1 50,000 Mana x5
10,800 minutes of Research Speedup spent | Legendary Medal x2 Gold Key x1 Silver Key x1 Level 3 Choice Resource Chest x2

Moreover, there is an additional ranking for the best players that spend the most amount of speedups. These players will receive the following rewards:

__TABLE__
Ranking | Rewards
Top 1 | Custom Legendary Token x20 60-minute Speedup x15 Gold Key x5 Silver Key x10
Top 2 | Custom Legendary Token x12 60-minute Speedup x12 Gold Key x4 Silver Key x6
Top 3 | Custom Legendary Token x8 60-minute Speedup x9 Gold Key x3 Silver Key x4
Top 4-10 | Custom Legendary Token x4 60-minute Speedup x6 Gold Key x2 Silver Key x2

3/5 - (2 votes)
